word: H6327 - פּוּץ - pûwts - poots - Break in pieces

sections.paragraph:
Original: פּוּץ

Transliteration: pûts

Phonetic: poots

BDB Definition:

  1. to scatter, be dispersed, be scattered
    1. (Qal) to be dispersed, be scattered
    2. (Niphal)
      1. to be scattered
      2. to be spread abroad
    3. (Hiphil) to scatter
    4. Hithpael) scatter
  2. (Qal) to flow, overflow
  3. to break
    1. (Polel) to shatter
    2. (Pilpel) to dash to pieces

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1745,1746,1800

Part(s) of speech: Verb
